User.title: User
User.description: A user of the application (teacher or student).

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

createdAt.description: The time the user was created.

Exam.title: Exam
Exam.description: An exam uploaded by a teacher.

id.description: The unique identifier of the exam.

title.description: The title of the exam (e.g., Baccalaureate 2023).

teacherId.description: The UID of the teacher who uploaded the exam.

questionsText.description: The exact text of the questions extracted from the master file.

answersText.description: The exact text of the model answers extracted from the master file.

createdAt.description: The time the exam was created.

Submission.title: Submission
Submission.description: A student's submission for an exam.

id.description: The unique identifier of the submission.

examId.description: The ID of the exam being submitted.

studentId.description: The UID of the student who submitted.

studentImageBase64.description: The base64 encoded image of the student's handwritten answer.

gradingResult.description: The detailed grading report generated by AI.

createdAt.description: The time the submission was created.
